instruction: In ~/{SRC} there are files in nested subfolders. Recursively find every .{EXT} file and copy it into the flat folder ~/{DST}.
source: adapted:osworld:23393935-50c7-4a86-aeea-2b78fd089c5c mode=port; OSWorld os 'recursively go through folders and copy any .jpg files into one directory' is a generic filesystem-collection task; maps to Finder/Terminal (find -name / cp) with a Tier-A exec getter counting the collected files
